title: CanonicalSKU
description: The catalog is the shared language of the network (§5.1). Disputes are decided against spec_hash, never against prose.

spec_hash.description: keccak256(spec_doc). Disputes are decided against this hash, not free-text description.

category.description: Launch-scope category (params.launchScope.categories); the enumerable set expands post-launch.

unit.description: The tradable unit this SKU is quoted and cleared in, e.g. "gpu-reserved-720h-block".

term_length.description: ISO-8601 duration for termed entitlements (drives StreamSettle re-verification cadence, §6.1), or null for untermed/perpetual SKUs.

vfm_class.description: Value-for-money predicate class (§6.2, params.vfm). Launch classes are A and B only (params.vfm.launchClasses).

vendor_domain.description: Domain-pinned vendor-of-record host; a seller that is not the vendor can never operate this endpoint.

api_schema.description: Set of JSONPath expressions the verifier evaluates against the vendor API response.

zktls_provider_ids.description: Authorized zkTLS provider identifiers for this SKU's attestation transcripts.

jurisdictions_allowed.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes this SKU may settle into.
